/**
 * Vendored by the Starwind CLI.
 * You own this file in your project.
 */

import {
  MenuCheckboxItem as ContextMenuCheckboxItem,
  MenuCheckboxItemIndicator as ContextMenuCheckboxItemIndicator,
  MenuGroup as ContextMenuGroup,
  MenuItem as ContextMenuItem,
  MenuLabel as ContextMenuLabel,
  MenuLinkItem as ContextMenuLinkItem,
  MenuPopup as ContextMenuPopup,
  MenuPortal as ContextMenuPortal,
  MenuPositioner as ContextMenuPositioner,
  MenuRadioGroup as ContextMenuRadioGroup,
  MenuRadioItem as ContextMenuRadioItem,
  MenuRadioItemIndicator as ContextMenuRadioItemIndicator,
  MenuSeparator as ContextMenuSeparator,
  MenuShortcut as ContextMenuShortcut,
  MenuSubmenuRoot as ContextMenuSubmenuRoot,
  MenuSubmenuTrigger as ContextMenuSubmenuTrigger,
} from "../menu";
import ContextMenuRoot from "./ContextMenuRoot.astro";
import ContextMenuTrigger from "./ContextMenuTrigger.astro";

const ContextMenu = {
  Root: ContextMenuRoot,
  Trigger: ContextMenuTrigger,
  Portal: ContextMenuPortal,
  Positioner: ContextMenuPositioner,
  Popup: ContextMenuPopup,
  Item: ContextMenuItem,
  LinkItem: ContextMenuLinkItem,
  CheckboxItem: ContextMenuCheckboxItem,
  CheckboxItemIndicator: ContextMenuCheckboxItemIndicator,
  RadioGroup: ContextMenuRadioGroup,
  RadioItem: ContextMenuRadioItem,
  RadioItemIndicator: ContextMenuRadioItemIndicator,
  Group: ContextMenuGroup,
  Label: ContextMenuLabel,
  Separator: ContextMenuSeparator,
  Shortcut: ContextMenuShortcut,
  SubmenuRoot: ContextMenuSubmenuRoot,
  SubmenuTrigger: ContextMenuSubmenuTrigger,
};

export {
  ContextMenu,
  ContextMenuCheckboxItem,
  ContextMenuCheckboxItemIndicator,
  ContextMenuGroup,
  ContextMenuItem,
  ContextMenuLabel,
  ContextMenuLinkItem,
  ContextMenuPopup,
  ContextMenuPortal,
  ContextMenuPositioner,
  ContextMenuRadioGroup,
  ContextMenuRadioItem,
  ContextMenuRadioItemIndicator,
  ContextMenuRoot,
  ContextMenuSeparator,
  ContextMenuShortcut,
  ContextMenuSubmenuRoot,
  ContextMenuSubmenuTrigger,
  ContextMenuTrigger,
};

export default ContextMenu;

export type {
  ContextMenuCloseCompleteDetails,
  ContextMenuOpenChangeDetails,
  MenuCheckedChangeDetails,
  MenuValueChangeDetails,
} from "@starwind-ui/runtime";

/**

import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types";

type Props = HTMLAttributes<"button">;

const { ...rest } = Astro.props;
---

<button
  type="button"
  data-sw-sidebar-rail
  aria-expanded="false"
  data-state="expanded"
  tabindex="-1"
  {...rest}
>
  <slot />
</button>
